name: Barcelona–El Prat Josep Tarradellas

exit_snippets.airport_express: From T1 arrivals, follow the "Aerobus A1" signs to the stop just outside; buy the ticket at the blue machine or onboard.
exit_snippets.metro: From T1, follow signs to "Aeroport T1" (Metro L9 Sud); validate your ticket at the gates.
exit_snippets.bus: From T1 arrivals, exit to the bus bays and check the line number on the platform display.

taxi_caveats: Use the official black-and-yellow taxi rank outside arrivals only. Meter starts ~EUR 2.55; a fixed airport supplement (~EUR 4.50) applies. All Barcelona taxis accept card.
